findings.title: Bucket versioning disabled
findings.description: Storage bucket gs://data-lake-prod does not have object versioning enabled, risking data loss from accidental deletion or overwrite.

findings.title: Bucket versioning disabled
findings.description: Storage bucket gs://data-lake-staging does not have object versioning enabled.

findings.title: Bucket allows public access
findings.description: Storage bucket gs://data-lake-prod has allUsers or allAuthenticatedUsers in its IAM policy, making data publicly accessible.

findings.title: User-managed service account key
findings.description: Service account deploy@prod.iam has a user-managed key older than 90 days. Use Workload Identity Federation instead.

findings.title: Branch protection does not require review
findings.description: Repository lexicone42/kase main branch allows direct pushes without pull request review.
